subject: Terada, a male-presenting figure with glasses in a confrontational stance, arms spread wide, with red-purple energy emanating behind them
description: A male-presenting figure wearing glasses and casual clothing — a jacket over a light shirt — stands with arms spread wide in a dramatic confrontational pose. The figure faces the viewer with an expression of angry pride or wounded ego. Behind them, a vivid red-purple energy aura or background effect radiates outward, amplifying the emotional intensity of the pose. The flavor text reads 'You'll pay with your lives for trampling all over my pride!' — the art communicates exactly that: wounded pride escalating to rage. The composition is a wide mid-shot capturing the full spread-arm gesture.
foreground: male-presenting figure with glasses in spread-arm confrontational pose, casual jacket and shirt
background: vivid red-purple energy aura radiating outward
emotion: wounded pride escalating to rage, arms spread wide in dramatic confrontation
